ADR-007 (decisions.md L230-305) 4 trade-offs documented: cost (Chromatic 5000 snapshots/month vs Playwright 무료), CI 호환성 (chromaui/action vs npx playwright install), self-hosting (Chromatic SaaS vs git commit baseline), 라이선스 (Chromatic SaaS 약관 vs Apache-2.0). C-9/C-14/C-20 완전 준수.

C-13/C-17 visual regression infra 본 Goal에서 도입 — block-on-migration-impact job (visual-regression.yml L53-63) 이 future high/medium PR의 visual regression gate 역할. C-18 1000행 가상화 timeout 60000ms 처리 (storybook.spec.ts L60-62 isVirtualized) AC-004 충족.
